title: OHS White Marble Table Cloth Wipe Clean Rectangular, Christmas Tablecloths Wipeable Water Resistant Tablecloth Dining Table Cover for Kitchen Outdoor Birthday, 132 x 178cm
features: Wipe Clean Table Cloth: Add a touch of sophistication to your dining area with this stylish white marble table cover waterproof. Its modern design complements any decor, making it perfect for both casual meals and special occasions like birthdays and Christmas.

132 x 178 cm: This rectangular tablecloth is ideal for most dining tables, providing full coverage for both indoor and outdoor settings. Whether you're hosting a dinner party or a family gathering, it’s the perfect size for your needs.

Multipurpose & Versatile: Not just for dining tables, this wipeable tablecloth is also great for outdoor picnics, BBQs or as a protective cover for kitchen tables, offering a versatile solution to protect surfaces from scratches, spills and stains.

Wipeable & Water-Resistant: Made from durable, water-resistant material 20% PVC with 80% non woven, this table cloth is designed to handle spills and stains with ease. Simply wipe clean after use, keeping your table looking fresh and spotless without the hassle of frequent washing.

Durable & Easy Maintenance: Designed for long-lasting use, this party table cloth is both easy to clean and stain-resistant, making it a low-maintenance yet stylish choice for everyday use or holiday celebrations. Simply wipe with a damp cloth for effortless cleaning.
description: Elevate your dining experience with the OHS White Marble Table Cloth, designed to add a touch of elegance to any occasion. Featuring a stunning white marble design, this rectangular tablecloth is perfect for everything from casual meals to special events like Christmas dinners, birthdays, and outdoor gatherings. Measuring 132 x 178 cm, it fits most dining tables, providing full coverage and a sleek, modern look. Made from water-resistant and wipeable material, this tablecloth is built to handle spills, stains, and everyday wear, offering easy maintenance with a simple wipe-down to keep it looking pristine. Whether you're hosting indoors or outdoors, this durable table cover protects your table from scratches and messes while enhancing the overall décor of your space. With its low-maintenance design, the OHS White Marble Table Cloth is the perfect blend of style and practicality, making it an essential addition to any home or celebration. Brand: OHS Product dimensions: 30L x 22W centimetres Colour: White Marble Material: PVC, Non Woven Shape: Rectangular Specific uses for product: Dining Table
